canonical_definition: CMedCalc-Bench is a Chinese clinical calculation benchmark containing 69 calculators and 1,143 real-world patient cases for evaluating medical LLMs.
papers: Exploring Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Steerable Pluralistic Alignment
